title: Navigating the Job Market
text:
We are Team 1 of AD688 (Spring 2026) five analysts exploring how the U.S. job market is evolving in the age of AI, remote work, and shifting industry demand. Drawing on thousands of job postings from the Lightcast dataset, we investigate where the opportunities are, which skills matter most, and how geography and industry shape career outcomes today.6666355
Each team member owns a research question below. Click any card to dive into the full analysis.
